imports.title: Database
imports.subtitle: Upload talent data snapshots for modeling.
imports.uploading_subtitle: Our intelligence engine is analyzing and indexing your data layer.
imports.success_subtitle: Your talent snapshot has been securely processed and is ready for scenario modeling.
imports.delete_confirm_title: Are you sure you want to delete this snapshot?

snapshots.empty_message: No snapshots have been published yet. Import your first talent dataset to start modeling.

users.subtitle: Manage secure access and high-level platform governance for your organization's core strategists.
users.search_placeholder: Search strategists by name, email or node ID...
users.security_desc: Enforce multi-factor authentication and advanced governance policies across all administrative strategic nodes.

admin.title: Organization Settings
admin.subtitle: Configure workspace identity and governance.
admin.privacy_desc: Zero-trust RLS layer ensures data separation.

merit.builder_subtitle: Configure compensation basis, budget, and merit matrix.
merit.matrix_preview_desc: Guideline percentages ("Up to X%") per rating × zone.
merit.no_runs_subtitle: Click Run to execute the merit engine against this snapshot.
merit.error_band_amounts_required: Min, midpoint and max are required.

gating_failed.title: Gating Policy Check Failed
gating_failed.message: The merit cycle cannot be published because the regulatory gates are not satisfied.
gating_failed.remediation: Check if the cycle is closed, all plans are approved, and the validator reports zero errors.

dead_run_data.title: Data Integrity Failure (DEAD_RUN)
dead_run_data.message: The selected scenario run contains invalid or empty financial data.
dead_run_data.remediation: Re-run the scenario engine against a fresh snapshot. Ensure employee salaries and recommended increases are correctly populated.

merit_admin.page_subtitle: Validate payroll readiness, lock manager plans, and close/reopen cycles with audit trails.
merit_admin.report_idle: Run validation to see readiness issues and budget signals.
merit_admin.bulk_lock_desc: Locks all manager plans in the selected cycle (audit recorded).
merit_admin.cycle_control_desc: Close is allowed only when the validator report is OK.
merit_admin.note_1: Close cycle is disabled unless validator report is OK.
merit_admin.note_2: Actions write to audit tables and refresh data automatically.
merit_admin.note_3: If your Supabase client import path differs, update src/services/meritAdminApi.ts.
merit_admin.publish_export_desc: Finalize recommendations and generate payroll files.
merit_admin.confirm_publish_desc: This will materialize results for payroll. Overwrite existing?
merit_admin.error_gating_failed: Gating conditions not met for publishing.

guide.title: Payroll Operation Guide
guide.step1_desc: Ensure all managers have finished and no budget errors exist.
guide.step2_desc: Lock the cycle to prevent changes. This is the final checkpoint before payment.
guide.step3_desc: Choose the winning scenario and generate the CSV file for your payment system.

tooltips.gating: Automatic rules that prevent errors before payment.
tooltips.validator: Scans thousands of rows for mathematical inconsistencies.

onboarding.title: Welcome to EvoComp Intelligence
onboarding.subtitle: Quick guide for compensation processes
onboarding.step1_content: Upload your employee data in 'Imports' using our CSV template. You'll receive instant confirmation.
onboarding.step2_content: In 'Imports', use the arrow in 'Operations' to send your data to the Scenarios section.
onboarding.step3_content: Go to 'Scenarios' to find your imports ready for compensation evaluation.
onboarding.step4_content: Use 'New Scenario' to define budgets, currencies, and calculation rules before modeling.
onboarding.step5_content: Open your scenario and run the engine to model increases for each employee accurately.

cycles.title: Compensation Cycles
cycles.subtitle: Manage salary review periods, bonuses, and equity adjustments.

snapshots.title: Data Snapshots
snapshots.subtitle: Secure repository of talent and compensation censuses.
snapshots.empty_message: No snapshots have been published yet. Import your first dataset to start.

hero.subtitle: Built for Total Rewards teams across the Americas. We deliver bank-grade, data-driven compensation decisions faster—using EvoComp's interactive scenario engine, not static spreadsheets.
hero.mono_text: Not a PDF shop. Not an Excel factory. A secure decision system.

features.card1_t1: What-if pools, matrices, caps, and constraints—deterministic results.
features.card1_t2: From modeling to execution: budget control, approvals, and governance.
features.card1_t3: Traceability by design: decisions you can explain in audits.

manifesto.t1: The usual question is: What went wrong?
manifesto.t2_1: We ask: What can be optimized—
manifesto.t3: >_ From spreadsheets to a secure decision operating system.

archive.card1_b1: What-if scenarios across teams, countries, and pay bases.
archive.card1_b2: Pools, matrices, caps, eligibility rules—deterministic outcomes.
archive.card1_b3: Ready for approvals and controlled rollout.
archive.card2_b1: Market-aligned pay bands and job leveling.
archive.card2_b2: Analytical job evaluation and architecture design.
archive.card2_b3: Consistency across geographies in the Americas.

archive.card3_b2: Bonus modeling and forecasting tied to performance.
archive.card3_b3: Transparent outputs for Finance and leadership.

security.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
security.c1_desc: Encrypted at rest and in transit. Designed to satisfy the most stringent compliance audits requested by IT and InfoSec stakeholders in large enterprises.
security.c2_desc: Stateless authentication validation via rigorously verified JWT tokens. Every API call requires fresh credential resolution ensuring session integrity.
security.c3_desc: Strict Row Level Security implemented directly on the PostgreSQL (Supabase) engine. Cross-tenant data bleeds are mathematically impossible by design.

pricing.title: Engagement Models
pricing.c2_b1: Full scenario engine access + guided consulting

footer.desc: Built for auditability, tenant isolation, and bank-grade data protection.

suggested_prompts.compression: What is our biggest compression risk?
suggested_prompts.alignment: Analyze market alignment for US Sales

composer.placeholder_ask: Ask about compensation risks, market gaps, or structural issues...
composer.placeholder_explain: Select a result or ask why a decision happened...
composer.placeholder_recommend: Describe the outcome you want to achieve (e.g., "Reduce market lag")...

response.default_error: An unexpected error occurred during reasoning.
response.insight_general: This error was generated at the transport or provider boundary.
response.insight_timeout: The reasoning depth requested exceeded the current latency ceiling (45s).
response.insight_overload: The AI provider is currently experiencing high demand.
response.insight_retry: Please review your connectivity or tenant settings and retry.
response.mock_note: Note: This response is generated using deterministic templates for UX validation and does not reflect real-time AI analysis.

stream.title: Reasoning Stream
stream.connectivity_limited: Connectivity limited — progress will update when finished
